Hash table and hash set implemented by fastmatch
hash_set() hash_exists(<hash_unordered_set>) hash_insert(<hash_unordered_set>) hash_delete(<hash_unordered_set>) hash_size(<hash_unordered_set>) hash_copy(<hash_unordered_set>) hash_keys(<hash_unordered_set>) hash_values(<hash_unordered_set>) `[[`(<hash_unordered_set>) `[`(<hash_unordered_set>) `$`(<hash_unordered_set>) `[[<-`(<hash_unordered_set>) `[<-`(<hash_unordered_set>) `$<-`(<hash_unordered_set>) length(<hash_unordered_set>) show(<hash_unordered_set>) as.hash_set() as.vector(<hash_unordered_set>)
Hash set implemented by std::unordered_set
hash_table() hash_values(<hash_unordered_map>) hash_exists(<hash_unordered_map>) hash_insert(<hash_unordered_map>) hash_delete(<hash_unordered_map>) hash_size(<hash_unordered_map>) length(<hash_unordered_map>) hash_keys(<hash_unordered_map>) hash_copy(<hash_unordered_map>) `[[`(<hash_unordered_map>) `[`(<hash_unordered_map>) `$`(<hash_unordered_map>) `[[<-`(<hash_unordered_map>) `[<-`(<hash_unordered_map>) `$<-`(<hash_unordered_map>) show(<hash_unordered_map>) as.hash_table() as.vector(<hash_unordered_map>) as.list(<hash_unordered_map>)
